general_rules_view.title: General rules
items: All requests and responses are in JSON format.
There is only one currency for simplicity: `"EUR"`.
A user cannot transfer money to themselves.
no more than 5 outgoing transfers per calendar day per sender user;
no more than 5,000 EUR of outgoing transfers per calendar day per sender user.

endpoint_rules_views.title: Create user
endpoint_rules: `email`: required, string, must be unique in the system and have a valid email format.

error_responses.description: invalid data (e.g. empty name, invalid email format)

endpoint_rules_views.title: Deposit (top up balance)
endpoint_rules: `userId`: required, must refer to an existing user.
`amount`: required, number > 0, up to two decimal places.

error_responses.description: invalid data (negative or zero amount, wrong amount format, unsupported currency)

endpoint_rules_views.title: Transfer between users
endpoint_rules: `senderId` and `receiverId`: required, both users must exist.
`amount`: number > 0, up to two decimal places.
After the transfer, the sender’s balance must not become negative.
no more than 5 outgoing transfers per calendar day;
total outgoing amount per calendar day ≤ 5,000 EUR.

error_responses.description: invalid data (senderId = receiverId, amount ≤ 0, unsupported currency)
insufficient funds on the sender’s account
daily limit on number of operations exceeded

parameters.name: `limit`
parameters.description: how many records to return (default 20, maximum 100).
